creator: tphilipp@potion-studios.com
text: Just for completeness: when pkg-install is executed, PKG_ROOTDIR is set, so the script has that information and should use it. The only issue is that crontab(1) cannot be used as it has no equivalent of -r, and given crontab(1)'s man page says that the crontab files "are not intended to be edited directly". As mentioned in the original description, I'm not sure how to best fix this.
